services.name: pub.universalName:find
services.description: WmPublic. Returns the fully qualified service name for an explicit universal name.

input_parameters.name: namespaceName
input_parameters.description: String Namespace portion of the universal name.

input_parameters.name: localName
input_parameters.description: String Local portion of the universal name.

output_parameters.name: svcName
output_parameters.description: String Conditional. Fully qualified name of the service associated with the universal name in namespaceName and localName. If the specified universal name is not in the registry, svcName will be null.

services.name: pub.universalName:findDocumentType
services.description: WmPublic. Returns the fully qualified document type name for a provided explicit universal name.

input_parameters.name: namespaceName
input_parameters.description: String Namespace portion of the universal name.

input_parameters.name: localName
input_parameters.description: String Local name portion of the universal name.

output_parameters.name: svcName
output_parameters.description: String Conditional. Fully qualified name of the document type associated with the universal name in namespaceName and localName. If the specified universal name is not in the registry, svcName will be null.

services.name: pub.universalName:list
services.description: WmPublic. Returns a list of services in the current universal-name registry.

output_parameters.name: names
output_parameters.description: Document List Service entries in the universal name registry. Each document (IData object) in the list represents a service entry in the universal-name registry. (There is one entry for every explicit universal name that has been defined on the server. Implicit universal names are not maintained in the registry.) Each document in the list contains the following information:

output_parameters.name: universalName
output_parameters.description: Document The universal name associated with the entry. This document contains the following information:

output_parameters.name: namespaceName
output_parameters.description: String Namespace portion of the universal name.

output_parameters.name: localName
output_parameters.description: String Local portion of the universal name.

output_parameters.name: svcName
output_parameters.description: String Fully qualified webMethods service name associated with the entry (for example, gl.post:postEntry).

usage_notes: Usage Notes To return the entire contents of the universal-name registry, use the pub.universalName:listAll service.

services.name: pub.universalName:listAll
services.description: WmPublic. Returns the contents of the current universal-name registry, including services and document types.

output_parameters.name: names
output_parameters.description: Document List Entries in the universal name registry. Each document (IData object) in the list represents an entry in the universal-name registry. There is one entry for every explicit universal name that has been defined on the server. Implicit universal names are not maintained in the registry. Each document in the list contains the following information:

output_parameters.name: universalName
output_parameters.description: Document Universal name associated with the entry. This document contains the following information:

output_parameters.name: namespaceName
output_parameters.description: String Namespace portion of the universal name.

output_parameters.name: localName
output_parameters.description: String Local portion of the universal name.

output_parameters.name: svcName
output_parameters.description: String Fully qualified Integration Server service name or document type name associated with the entry (for example, gl.post:postEntry).

usage_notes: Usage Notes To return a list of the services in the universal-name registry only, use the pub.universalName:listservice.
